creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
When I try to start games/crack-attack via "crack-attack --solo" command it crashes with the following error:
dog@dog:~> crack-attack --solo
Crack Attack! v1.1.14

freeglut  ERROR:  Function <glutCreateWindow> called without first calling 'glutInit'.
I have ports revision 322867 completely updated. Videocard in my PC is NVidia GeForce GT 430 (nvidia-driver 310.44). I use new X.org ("WITH_NEW_XORG=yes" in make.conf).

Fix: 

Have no idea.
How-To-Repeat: Install and try to run games/crack-attack from the latest revision of ports tree.
